description: Russians damage agricultural facility in Chernihiv Oblast Russian forces struck a village in the Semenivka hromada in Chernihiv Oblast on the morning of 7 June, using an attack drone damaging a private agricultural facility. title: Zelensky tried to convey to Putin the offer of a personal meeting...
title_en: Zelensky tried to convey to Putin the offer of a personal meeting...
title_uk: Зеленський намагався передати Путіну пропозицію особистої зустрічі...
description: Zelensky tried to convey to Putin the offer of a personal meeting through Abramovich, but was refused, - Financial Times FT with reference to four sources familiar with the situation, writes that on May 21, Russian oligarch Roman Abramovich secretly came to Kyiv and met with Zelensky. After that, the President of Ukraine asked him to convey to Putin a message about readiness for direct negotiations and a personal summit....
description_en: Zelensky tried to convey to Putin the offer of a personal meeting through Abramovich, but was refused, - Financial Times FT with reference to four sources familiar with the situation, writes that on May 21, Russian oligarch Roman Abramovich secretly came to Kyiv and met with Zelensky. After that, the President of Ukraine asked him to convey to Putin a message about readiness for direct negotiations and a personal summit....
description_uk: Зеленский пытался передать путину предложение о личной встрече через Абрамовича, но получил отказ, - Financial Times FT со ссылкой на четыре источника, знакомых с ситуацией, пишет, что 21 мая российский олигарх Роман Абрамович тайно приезжал в Киев и встречался с Зеленским. После этого президент Украины попросил его передать путину сообщение о готовности к прямым переговорам и личному саммиту....

title: Kyiv: Explosions reported
description: Update: Ukraine's Security Service says it considers Russia's strike on the spent storage facility in Chornobyl to be a war crime. "The explosion damaged the spent nuclear fuel reception and reloading building and the IAEA administrative building," the agency said in a statement. "Investigators from Ukraine's Security Service... are taking measures to find and punish those involved in this...

title: 😏Ukrainian drones give Russians a dream vacation: thousands of...
title_en: 😏Ukrainian drones give Russians a dream vacation: thousands of...
title_uk: 😏Українські дрони дарують росіянам омріяну відпустку: тисячі...
description: 😏Ukrainian drones give Russians a dream vacation: thousands of tourists cannot fly out of Sochi for the second day. The airport has a real resort vibe: people sleep on the floor, elevators break down due to overload, passengers feel sick from suffocation, and the flight board is almost empty. 39 flights were delayed on arrival, 37 on departure, and another 17 were cancelled. Lapota
description_en: 😏Ukrainian drones give Russians a dream vacation: thousands of tourists cannot fly out of Sochi for the second day. The airport has a real resort vibe: people sleep on the floor, elevators break down due to overload, passengers feel sick from suffocation, and the flight board is almost empty. 39 flights were delayed on arrival, 37 on departure, and another 17 were cancelled. Lapota
description_uk: 😏Украинские дроны устраивают россиянам отпуск мечты: тысячи туристов вторые сутки не могут улететь из Сочи В аэропорту настоящий курортный вайб: люди спят на полу, лифты выходят из строя от перегрузки, пассажирам становится плохо от духоты, а табло с рейсами практически пустые. На прилет задержаны 39 рейсов, на вылет — 37, еще 17 отменены. Ляпота.

title: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Even if the USA gives Ukraine all new missiles for Patriot, they will still not be enough against Russian ballistics, — Defense Express According to analysts, the Russian Federation releases up to 113 ballistic, aeroballistic and hypersonic missiles every month, for which Ukraine needs Patriot systems to intercept. For comparison: the American company Lockheed Martin now produces about 52 PAC-3 MSE missiles per month...
description_en: Even if the USA gives Ukraine all new missiles for Patriot, they will still not be enough against Russian ballistics, — Defense Express According to analysts, the Russian Federation releases up to 113 ballistic, aeroballistic and hypersonic missiles every month, for which Ukraine needs Patriot systems to intercept. For comparison: the American company Lockheed Martin now produces about 52 PAC-3 MSE missiles per month...
description_uk: Даже если США отдадут Украине все новые ракеты для Patriot, их все равно не хватит против российской баллистики, — Defense Express По данным аналитиков, рф ежемесячно выпускает до 113 баллистических, аэробаллистических и гиперзвуковых ракет, для перехвата которых Украине нужны системы Patriot. Для сравнения: американская компания Lockheed Martin сейчас производит около 52 ракет PAC-3 MSE в месяц...
